name: RedDoorz Syariah near Simpang Surabaya Aceh

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. As an added bonus, restaurant is provided on-site to conveniently serve your needs.

comments.reviewComments: Cheap price but the facilities are even cheaper. The paint is peeling, the walls are marked with lipstick, and there is no soap.
comments.originalComment: Harga murah tp fasilitasnya lebih murah lagi. Cat terkelupas, dinding tercoret lipstik, gak ada sabun

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Simpang Surabaya Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The real name of the hotel is Mars. The address of the hotel on Google maps is wrong. It's not close to Simpang Surabaya. As locals told me is completely different area, much further from centre of Banda Aceh.  It is a lot of construction going on in the building, the common area very dirty. The first thing I found in the bathroom was a cockroach. The room had a strange smell. For the same price  you can find better options in Banda Aceh.
comments.reviewTitle: The wrong hotel than it's shown on Google maps

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Simpang Surabaya Aceh
comments.reviewComments: No water all day for both 2 rooms, really bad, not worth it booking via online because if booking with hotel directly, they will give better room. sound noise with outside building roof at night when heavy raining. Request lower floor but given the uppest floor. Big luggage need lift up.
comments.reviewTitle: NO WATER BOTH STAY IN 2 ROOMS. REQUEST LOWER FLOOR BUT GIVEN UPPEST FLOOR WITH NO LIFT

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Simpang Surabaya Aceh
comments.reviewComments: I have booked and paid via Agoda, but when I arrived at the hotel, I was informed by the hotel that they do not cooperate with Agoda, and the hotel does not take responsibility and does not care about the client's loss.
comments.originalComment: Udah boking dan bayar via agoda, pas udah sampai hotel di bilang pihak hotel tidak bekerja sama dgn agoda, lalu pihak hotel tidak bertanggung jawab dan tidak perduli atas kerugian klien.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments: highly not recommended
comments.reviewTitle: Not worthy of being called accommodation.

comments.reviewComments: Not recommended for those with families and small children. The room is stuffy and not very clean.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Simpang Surabaya Aceh
comments.reviewComments: When I entered, the room did not meet my expectations at all. I wanted a refund, but I couldn't because I wanted it on check-in day. But upon seeing the room, I was very disappointed. It was different from the photos.
comments.originalComment: Ketika masuk melihat kamar nya sangat tidak sesuai dengan ekspektasi. Saya berkeinginan untuk direfund uangnya, tapi tidak bisa Krn saya ingin direfund di hari check in. Tapi begitu melihat kamarnya, saya sangat kecewa. Beda dgn di foto.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Simpang Surabaya Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Cheap, but the hotel is dirty. It looks good from the app, but when you get to the room, it's filthy, especially under the bed. The bathroom is dirty, and there are spider webs in the room. It's really not good. Not recommended 👎
comments.originalComment: Murah, tapi Hotelnya kumuh, dri apk terlihat bgus, bgtu ke kekamarnya jorok.. apalagi di bawah tempat tdrnnya.. kmr mndi nya jorok..sarang laba laba d kamar. Pkonya engk banget. No recommended 👎

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments: The floor in the hallway and stairs is heavily dusty. The service is unfriendly.
comments.originalComment: Lantai di lorong dan tangga berdebu berat. Pelayanan tidak ramah.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments:
Staf dan lokasi bagus,
Ruangan tanpa jendela, sempit banget, tempat solat pun susah, air penghangat nyaris tidak ada, westafel rusak, blower rusak, sirkulasi udara tidak ada selain AC.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Simpang Surabaya Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
1. AC bocor.. Air masuk ke dalam lantai kamar
2. Kamar pengap
3. Kamar mandi sangat jorok
4. Alat dalam kamar mandi banyak tidak bisa digunakan
5. Tv tidak nyala
6. Handuk tidak dikasih
7. Pintu kamar rusak
8. Pokoknya overall is bed lah..

comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Simpang Surabaya Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
Handuk tiba2 hilang,ternyata staf masuk ke kamar pdhl sy sdh titp .pesan ke resepsionis kalo sy mau pergi sarapan dlu tp belum check out..sy sampai pusing nyari2 handuk tsebut, setelah sy tanya redepsionis baru dia jelaskan sama saya..wadohhhh blg dunk klu masuk kamar kita..... Untung tdk ada barang berharga.
Kamar mandi sempit sy yg TB 163 Cm agak susah gunakan toilet duduk, krn lutut saya nyentuh dinding Kamarvmandi.
Lokasi OK dekat cafe n minimarket
